clang++ -stdlib=libc++ -fPIC -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/udp_broadcaster.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/udp_broadcaster.dir/examples/sgcore-udp-broadcaster.cpp.o" -o udp_broadcaster   -L/home/runner/work/glove_ros2/glove_ros2/lib/linux/v22/x86-64/debug  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/glove_ros2/glove_ros2/lib/linux/v22/x86-64/debug /home/runner/work/glove_ros2/glove_ros2/lib/linux/v22/x86-64/debug/libsgcore.so /home/runner/work/glove_ros2/glove_ros2/lib/linux/v22/x86-64/debug/libsgconnect.so -lc++ -lc++abi
